name: commit with a Decision trailer passes the commit-message validator successfully
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && touch architectural.txt && git add . && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q -m "change\n\nDecision: 0042") && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/git/validate-commit-trailer.sh" --root repo --require-decision-on-paths architectural.txt 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision_trailer=0042' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
